name: claude-codex-mirror
description: Cross-vendor mirror: invoke Codex CLI as an external auditor for brainstorm, plan calibration, and diff review. Built on the principle that another model is a mirror, not a sub-agent.

plugins.name: co
plugins.description: Three co-* commands (/co-brainstorm, /co-calibrate-plan, /co-review-diff) for cross-vendor LLM review via Codex.
